chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-610 of 2024 _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge _______________________________________________________________ For order as to maintainability of petition. 23-12-2024. Mr.Muhammad Akram Tariq, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.K.A.Wahab, Advocate along with Syed Zulfiqar Ali Shah, Advocate for Respondent No.2 --- Mr.K.A.Wahab, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.2, which is taken on record. The petition impugns the judgment dated 21.12.2022 rendered by respondent No.1. Irrespective of the merits of the case, it is pointed out that the petition is prima facie barred by laches as it was preferred on 02.02.2024. Petitioner’s counsel remained unable to dispel the bar of laches, therefore, this petition is dismissed. Judge Judge nasir
